name: Azure Storage Account Successful Creation Or Updation With Anonymous Access To Blob Containers
description: This model detects successful creation or updation of an Azure storage account with anonymous access to blob containers which may indicate an attacker trying to expose sensitive data or resources to the internet.

rules.name: Azure Storage Account Successful Creation Or Updation With Anonymous Access To Blob Containers

author: Yash Verma and Srivathsa H S
